description: Replace per-step full-array TIP4P `hneigh[][2]` reset with a toggled per-step stamp in `pair_lj_cut_tip4p_long` to avoid `O(nall)` flag clearing each timestep while preserving re-neighbor invalidation. [Correctness passed and runtime improved, but the +1.43% gain is below the contract’s +2.0% minimum relative improvement threshold.]

Ported OPT-style specialized inner-loop compute (`eval<...>` dispatch) into default `pair_lj_cut_tip4p_long` and replaced per-step `hneigh[][2]` clearing with a toggled stamp to cut force-kernel memory/branch overhead. [Candidate 2687c05eb308 improves weighted_median_wall_seconds_per_100_steps by 11.59% vs incumbent with correctness/guardrails passing, exceeding the +2.0% contract threshold.]

Flatten TIP4P long-pair hot-loop data access by using contiguous x/f [3]-views and hoisting per-i hneigh/LJ/Coulomb constants to reduce inner-loop pointer-chasing overhead. [Primary metric decreased from 0.307969708520 to 0.291823301988 (+5.24% vs incumbent) with correctness/guardrails passing and no hard reject, clearing the +2.0% acceptance threshold.]

Precompute TIP4P oxygen virtual sites once per step in compute() and remove per-pair lazy hneigh stamp refreshes from the eval() hot loop. [Primary metric improved from 0.291823301988 to 0.285449812480 (+2.18% vs incumbent) with correctness/guardrails passing and no hard reject, clearing the 2.0% minimum improvement threshold.]

Reduce TIP4P long-pair hot-loop overhead by skipping LJ-row setup for hydrogen i-atoms and deferring special_lj/special_coul lookups until LJ/Coulomb branches are actually entered. [Correctness passed, but the candidate’s +0.7743% improvement vs incumbent is below the contract’s +2.0% minimum, so incumbent 08902c8107d6 is retained.]

Flatten TIP4P hneigh/newsite hot-path access to contiguous 2D views and use an sbmask common-case fast path to defer special_lj/special_coul lookups in pair_lj_cut_tip4p_long eval() [Correctness and guardrails passed, and the primary metric improved by +2.2755% vs incumbent (0.285449812480 -> 0.278954479261), clearing the +2.0% acceptance threshold.]

Split `pair_lj_cut_tip4p_long::eval()` to make `sbmask==0` the explicit common-case fast path for LJ/Coulomb special scaling, gating rare `special_lj/special_coul` work behind `sb!=0` while preserving TIP4P force partitioning semantics. [Correctness and guardrails passed, but the candidate is 0.3445% slower than incumbent on the primary metric, so it fails the +2.0% minimum improvement contract.]

Accumulate TIP4P i-oxygen hydrogen force-partition contributions in local scalars inside `pair_lj_cut_tip4p_long::eval()` and flush to `f[iH1/iH2]` once per outer-`i` iteration to reduce per-neighbor force-array write traffic. [Correctness/guardrails passed, but the candidate’s +1.03% primary-metric improvement vs incumbent is below the +2.0% contract threshold.]

Accumulate TIP4P i-water hydrogen force-partition contributions once per outer-i and reuse cached i-side coordinates for virial math in pair_lj_cut_tip4p_long::eval() to reduce hot-loop writes/loads. [Primary metric improved from 0.278954479261 to 0.271962072991 (+2.5066% vs incumbent) with correctness/guardrails passing and no hard reject, clearing the +2.0% threshold.]

Precompute and cache per-oxygen TIP4P virial-weighted coordinates (`vsite`) in `compute()` and reuse them in `eval()` for i/j oxygen virial terms to reduce hot-loop hydrogen-coordinate loads/arithmetic while preserving force partitioning. [Correctness passed, but the candidate regressed the primary metric by 1.61% vs incumbent (0.276346416736 vs 0.271962072991), so it fails the +2.0% acceptance threshold.]

Reuse TIP4P precomputed M-site coordinates (`newsite` via `x1`/`x2`) for O-side virial accumulation in `pair_lj_cut_tip4p_long::eval()` to eliminate per-interaction hydrogen-coordinate loads and weighted-coordinate reconstruction while keeping force/energy paths unchanged. [Correctness/guardrails passed, but the candidate regressed the primary metric by 1.12% vs incumbent and fails the +2.0% minimum-improvement contract, so incumbent ecf63fa05a3a remains.]

Add a non-O Coulomb fast path in `pair_lj_cut_tip4p_long::eval()` that uses a tighter `cut_coulsq` gate and direct `ev_tally` for H-H interactions, while keeping TIP4P off-site partition logic only for O-involving pairs. [Correctness passed, but the primary metric gain vs incumbent was only +0.1155% (0.271962072991 -> 0.271647968737), below the required +2.0% minimum improvement.]

Tighten TIP4P Coulomb outer gating in `pair_lj_cut_tip4p_long::eval()` with pair-type-specific reach bounds: `cut_coulsq` for non-O pairs, `(cut_coul+qdist)^2` for one-O pairs, and `(cut_coul+2*qdist)^2` for O-O pairs before off-site recomputation. [Hard reject: candidate 6bcb1eb9e1c7 is faster (+3.14%) but fails field-tolerance correctness (thermo etotal/pe/ke/press deltas exceed thresholds in both cases), so incumbent ecf63fa05a3a stays.; case train-small-repeat thermo.etotal relative_delta exceeds threshold (5.65475e-06 > 1e-07); case train-small-repeat thermo.pe relative_delta exceeds threshold (2.70921e-06 > 1e-07); case train-small-repeat thermo.ke relative_delta exceeds threshold (2.08264e-07 > 1e-07); case train-small-repeat thermo.press relative_delta exceeds threshold (2.76407e-05 > 1e-05); case test-long thermo.etotal relative_delta exceeds threshold (1.32489e-05 > 1e-07); case test-long thermo.pe relative_delta exceeds threshold (6.02534e-06 > 1e-07); case test-long thermo.ke relative_delta exceeds threshold (4.19238e-07 > 1e-07); case test-long thermo.press relative_delta exceeds threshold (0.000390343 > 1e-05)]

Use measured per-step TIP4P M-site displacement to apply pair-type-specific Coulomb outer gates in pair_lj_cut_tip4p_long::eval() while keeping the exact inner rsq<cut_coulsq force path unchanged. [Hard reject: candidate 474a3d399ddcd5fd6f9921343b90898a338d4e20 is faster (+3.24%) but fails field-tolerance correctness (thermo.pe/ke/etotal/press deltas), so incumbent ecf63fa05a3ac83a608a57ce5822e93c4ff074a7 remains.; case train-small-repeat thermo.pe relative_delta exceeds threshold (1.46444e-07 > 1e-07); case train-small-repeat thermo.ke relative_delta exceeds threshold (4.16528e-07 > 1e-07); case test-long thermo.etotal relative_delta exceeds threshold (3.09916e-07 > 1e-07); case test-long thermo.ke relative_delta exceeds threshold (2.09619e-07 > 1e-07); case test-long thermo.press relative_delta exceeds threshold (2.52228e-05 > 1e-05)]

Tighten non-O Coulomb outer gating to `cut_coulsq` and reuse precomputed H-coordinate sums for O-path virial accumulation in `pair_lj_cut_tip4p_long::eval()` to cut unnecessary checks and arithmetic. [Candidate improved weighted_median_wall_seconds_per_100_steps by +2.5689% vs incumbent (0.271962072991 -> 0.264975531201) with correctness and guardrails passing and no hard reject.]

Refactor `pair_lj_cut_tip4p_long::eval()` Coulomb off-site reach handling to early-continue `i_is_O`/`j_is_O` gating and cache `q[j]` once per Coulomb interaction, while preserving existing cutoff and TIP4P force/virial semantics. [Primary metric improved by +20.50% vs incumbent (0.264975531201 -> 0.210648385517) with correctness/guardrails passing and no hard reject.]

Cache per-i TIP4P charge-site and per-neighbor x[j] coordinates as scalars in pair_lj_cut_tip4p_long::eval() to reduce hot-loop load/addressing overhead while preserving existing cutoff and TIP4P force/virial partition semantics. [Correctness passed, but the candidate is 0.8455% slower than incumbent on the primary metric and fails the +2.0% minimum-improvement contract.]
